title: Pol III modeling data and scripts using the Integrative Modeling Platform
author: Riccardo Pellarin
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by
description: This repository contains the data obtained running the Integrative modeling platform with crosslinks and cryoem data, on the RNA Pol III system.
